title: Better Lights v1.5.0
items: Added menu translations for several popular Garry's Mod languages.
Added contributor notes for translation fixes and improvements.
Updated the Workshop page with translation support details.

title: Better Lights v1.4.3
items: Added lights for spawned and dropped weapon pickups.
Added pickup lights for AR2 ammo and optional lights for other ammo pickups.
Added a flashlight forward offset setting.
Improved the settings menu with better grouping and color pickers.
Added an in-game changelog browser.
Improved the About page with author, license, and support links.
Improved rollermine color settings for detected skins.
Improved flashlight behavior when no weapon is equipped.
Improved flashlight compatibility with vehicles and server settings.

title: Better Lights v1.4.2
items: Added more player flashlight visual options.
Added custom flashlight texture selection with previews.
Improved the flashlight settings layout.
Fixed flashlight behavior when changing levels.

title: Better Lights v1.4.1
items: Simplified the Better Lights flashlight settings.

title: Better Lights v1.4.0
items: Added a new toggle to quickly enable or disable Better Lights.
Added an option to reset all Better Lights settings.
Made the Better Lights flashlight disabled by default for new users.
Reworked the flashlight settings menu to separate personal and server options.
Moved flashlight sound preference to a personal setting.
Added a changelog button to the About menu.

title: Better Lights v1.3.5
items: Added an option to disable Better Lights flashlight sounds and use the vanilla flashlight sounds.

title: Better Lights v1.3.4
items: When the flashlight module is disabled, it no longer still intercepts player input.
Added a Beam Length slider for the Better Lights player flashlight.

title: Better Lights v1.3.3
items: Fixed the Better Lights player flashlight disappearing when using suit zoom with HUD addons such as HoloHUD2.
The flashlight now falls back to a stable eye-position origin while zooming instead of relying on the first-person viewmodel attachment.

title: Better Lights v1.3.2
items: Improved player flashlight compatibility with addons and gamemodes.

title: Better Lights v1.3.1
items: Fixed the player flashlight sometimes turning on but not turning off.
Improved flashlight toggle handling so it behaves more like the vanilla flashlight.
Added protection against duplicate flashlight input events.
Prevented the vanilla flashlight from getting stuck on behind the Better Lights flashlight.

title: Better Lights v1.3.0
items: Added a new BetterLights player flashlight module.
Added a dedicated Flashlight settings category.
Custom sounds for the flashlight.
Code cleanup and slight performance improvements.
